metadata.description: Synthetic seed dataset for a low-CO2 food substitution recommender. CO2 values are inspired by the Big Climate Database; all item records besides general category structure are fictional and synthesized for prototyping.

rules_used.principle: Foods share a substitution group if they play a realistic, similar role in the same meal context.
rules: Functional equivalence: items should serve the same culinary purpose.
Similar preparation context: items should be prepared/consumed in similar ways.
Comparable meal position: items should fit the same place in a meal or snack.
Plausible user acceptance: groups should avoid unrealistic replacements.
Sustainability use-case: groups should support lower-CO2 switching where possible.

features.name: original_co2
features.description: CO2 emission of original item (kg CO2e/kg)

features.name: original_price
features.description: Price of original item in EUR

features.name: original_calories
features.description: Calories per 100g of original item

features.name: original_protein
features.description: Protein grams per 100g of original item

features.name: original_is_meat
features.description: 1 if original item is meat, else 0

features.name: original_is_dairy
features.description: 1 if original item is dairy, else 0

features.name: original_is_plant_based
features.description: 1 if original item is plant-based/grain/fruit/veg beverage, else 0

features.name: original_category_id
features.description: Integer-encoded substitution group or category ID for original item

features.name: candidate_co2
features.description: CO2 emission of candidate item (kg CO2e/kg)

features.name: candidate_price
features.description: Price of candidate item in EUR

features.name: candidate_calories
features.description: Calories per 100g of candidate item

features.name: candidate_protein
features.description: Protein grams per 100g of candidate item

features.name: candidate_is_meat
features.description: 1 if candidate item is meat, else 0

features.name: candidate_is_dairy
features.description: 1 if candidate item is dairy, else 0

features.name: candidate_is_plant_based
features.description: 1 if candidate item is plant-based/grain/fruit/veg beverage, else 0

features.name: candidate_category_id
features.description: Integer-encoded substitution group or category ID for candidate item

features.name: co2_delta
features.description: candidate_co2 - original_co2

features.name: co2_reduction
features.description: original_co2 - candidate_co2

features.name: price_delta
features.description: candidate_price - original_price

features.name: calorie_delta
features.description: candidate_calories - original_calories

features.name: protein_delta
features.description: candidate_protein - original_protein

features.name: same_category_flag
features.description: 1 if original and candidate share the same substitution group, else 0

features.name: similarity_score
features.description: Similarity score from candidate generator, normalized 0 to 1

features.name: is_lower_co2_flag
features.description: 1 if candidate_co2 < original_co2, else 0

features.name: cart_size
features.description: Number of items currently in cart

features.name: session_step
features.description: Index of current interaction within session

features.name: previous_nudge_outcome
features.description: 1 accepted, 0 none/ignored, -1 rejected

features.name: nudges_shown_this_session
features.description: Number of nudges already shown in current session
